The eagerness and dedication with which these builders began their work, the precision with which they carried it out, and the integrity with which they refused to accept more contributions are worthy of our imitation. We should serve God, and those in authority over us, in all lawful things. All who hold public positions should detest greed and avoid opportunities and temptations to covetousness. Where do we have a representation of God’s love toward us, so that by love we dwell in him and he in us, except in Emmanuel? This is the sum of the ministry of reconciliation. This was the design of the “tabernacle of witness,” a visible testimony of the love of God to humankind, however they had fallen from their original state. And this love was shown by Christ taking up his dwelling on earth; by the Word becoming flesh, wherein, as the original expresses it, he did tabernacle among us.
